# bao-boss

> Bun-native job queue library built on PostgreSQL — reliable background job processing with SKIP LOCKED concurrency, automatic retries, cron scheduling, pub/sub fan-out, dead letter queues, and an HTMX dashboard.

## Overview

bao-boss is a PostgreSQL-backed job queue designed for the Bun runtime. It uses `SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED` for reliable concurrent job fetching, supports configurable retry policies with exponential backoff, cron-based scheduling, event-driven pub/sub, dead letter queues, and includes a built-in HTMX dashboard as an Elysia plugin.

## Quick Start

Install with Bun:

```bash
bun add bao-boss
```

Basic usage:

```typescript
import { BaoBoss } from 'bao-boss'

const boss = new BaoBoss({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL })
await boss.start()

await boss.createQueue('emails', { retryLimit: 3, retryBackoff: true })
const id = await boss.send('emails', { to: 'user@example.com', subject: 'Hello' })

await boss.work('emails', async ([job]) => {
  console.log('Sending email to:', job.data.to)
})
```

## Stack

- Runtime: Bun (native APIs, test runner)
- HTTP: Elysia (dashboard plugin)
- ORM: Prisma (schema, migrations) + raw SQL (SKIP LOCKED)
- Dashboard: htmx (server-rendered HTML)
- Language: TypeScript (strict mode)
- Database: PostgreSQL 15+ (SKIP LOCKED, pgcrypto)

## Core Concepts

### Job States
created -> active -> completed | failed
failed -> created (retry) | DLQ (exhausted)
created | active -> cancelled
cancelled | failed -> created (resume)

### Queue Policies
- standard: Default FIFO, multiple jobs allowed
- short: At most one created job at a time
- singleton: At most one active job at a time
- stately: At most one created + one active simultaneously

### SKIP LOCKED
Jobs are fetched using PostgreSQL `SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED`, ensuring multiple workers can safely poll the same queue without conflicts.

## API

### Lifecycle
- `new BaoBoss(options?)` — Create instance
- `boss.start()` — Connect and start maintenance
- `boss.stop()` — Graceful shutdown

### Queue Management
- `boss.createQueue(name, options?)` — Create a queue
- `boss.updateQueue(name, options)` — Update queue settings
- `boss.deleteQueue(name)` — Delete queue and all jobs
- `boss.purgeQueue(name)` — Delete pending jobs
- `boss.getQueue(name)` — Get queue config
- `boss.getQueues()` — List all queues
- `boss.getQueueSize(name, options?)` — Count pending/active jobs

### Job Operations
- `boss.send(queue, data?, options?)` — Send a job (returns UUID)
- `boss.insert(jobs)` — Batch insert jobs
- `boss.fetch(queue, options?)` — Manually fetch and lock jobs
- `boss.complete(id, options?)` — Mark job completed
- `boss.fail(id, error?)` — Mark job failed (with retry logic)
- `boss.cancel(id)` — Cancel a job
- `boss.resume(id)` — Re-enqueue cancelled/failed job
- `boss.getJobById(id)` — Get job by UUID
- `boss.getJobsById(ids)` — Get multiple jobs

### Workers
- `boss.work(queue, options?, handler)` — Start polling worker
- `boss.offWork(queueOrId)` — Stop worker(s)

### Scheduling
- `boss.schedule(name, cron, data?, options?)` — Create cron schedule
- `boss.unschedule(name)` — Remove schedule
- `boss.getSchedules()` — List schedules

### Pub/Sub
- `boss.publish(event, data?, options?)` — Fan-out to subscribed queues
- `boss.subscribe(event, queue)` — Subscribe queue to event
- `boss.unsubscribe(event, queue)` — Unsubscribe

### Dashboard
- `baoBossDashboard(boss, options?)` — Elysia plugin for HTMX dashboard

## Configuration Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| connectionString | string | DATABASE_URL env | PostgreSQL connection |
| prisma | PrismaClient | auto | Bring your own Prisma client |
| maintenanceIntervalSeconds | number | 120 | Maintenance loop interval |
| archiveCompletedAfterSeconds | number | 43200 | Archive completed jobs after |
| deleteArchivedAfterDays | number | 7 | Delete archived jobs after |
| noSupervisor | boolean | false | Disable maintenance |
| shutdownGracePeriodSeconds | number | 30 | Worker drain timeout |

## Send Options

| Option | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| priority | number | Higher = processed first (default: 0) |
| startAfter | number/string/Date | Delay before job is eligible |
| retryLimit | number | Max retry attempts |
| retryDelay | number | Seconds between retries |
| retryBackoff | boolean | Exponential backoff |
| expireIn | number | Seconds before active job expires |
| singletonKey | string | Deduplication key |
| deadLetter | string | Dead letter queue name |

## Database Schema

All tables in `baoboss` PostgreSQL schema:
- `baoboss.job` — Jobs with state, retry info, payload
- `baoboss.queue` — Queue config and policies
- `baoboss.schedule` — Cron schedules
- `baoboss.subscription` — Pub/sub mappings

## Events

| Event | Payload | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| error | Error | Unhandled errors |
| wip | { count } | In-flight job heartbeat |
| stopped | — | Instance stopped |

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/d4551/bao-boss
- License: MIT
- Runtime: Bun >= 1.0
- Database: PostgreSQL 15+
